mapper.select: SELECT * FROM game_session ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM game_session WHERE dm_id = #{dmId} ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC

SELECT * FROM game_session WHERE (start_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) OR (end_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}) OR (start_time <= #{startTime} AND end_time >= #{endTime}) ORDER BY IFNULL(updated_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_session
AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_session(script_id, dm_id, start_time, end_time, status, max_players, current_players) VALUES(#{scriptId}, #{dmId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{status}, #{maxPlayers}, #{currentPlayers})
